key_rationale: Current spec + implementation center single-nullable-level with fail-loud preservation. OPT-C promotes shallow heuristic to first-class contract surface. Evidence OPT-C would use is already preserved under D-023 via REQ-SRC-0046 — level_candidate adds derived judgment, not preserved datum. Blast radius is large (new record type, new controlled values, confidence caps, provenance fields, reconciliation semantics, UI precedence rules). Taxonomy ownership shift is scope expansion not simplification. D-023 + disputed-is-valid already satisfied by OPT-B with less distortion.

key_rationale: Ibn Khaldun Muqaddima Book VI pp292-294 - tadarruj requires internal-density leveling, shallow signals contradict malakah-formation. Al-Zarnuji Talim ch IV - 2-month tawaqquf before commitment. Fihris precedent (Ibn al-Nadim, Hajji Khalifa) systematically avoids provisional pedagogical tags. Crux Q6: operationally a zanni fatwa flattens to assertion for mustafti; confidence=low tags will be ignored in practice. OPT-C's epistemological modesty fails operationally.
